name: Orange-Glazed Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ham into 3/4-inch chunks.
2. Cut the celery at a slant, then into half-inch pieces.
3. If the mandarin orange sections do not contain pineapple, add pineapple to taste.
4. Mix cornstarch and ground ginger in a small bowl.
5. Combine the prepared ingredients and season with the cornstarch mixture.
6. Turn off the heat when serving.
